title: Rectorate Common Courses 2024-2025 Spring Term Supplement Dates/Times
content:
Rectorate Common Courses 2024-2025 Spring Term Supplement Dates/Times

Rectorate Common Courses Supplemental exams will be held on Thursday, July 10, 2025, at the times given in the table below. Supplemental exams will be held in the Central Campus B-C-D blocks classrooms. You can see the halls where you will take the exam in the STIX course announcements. (Students with DD-DC letter grades who want to take the make-up exam will be present at the Central Campus C Block -1st Floor Aziz Sancar Conference Hall at the exam time of the relevant course.)

Thursday, July 10, 2025

17:30-18:00

18:10-18:40

18:50 - 19:20
